title: Drip vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Drip and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which is best for your business needs.
intro: Drip and Moosend are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Drip specializes in e-commerce automation with deep store integration, while Moosend offers affordable, flexible email marketing for small businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce businesses with deep store integration needs
comparison_table.tool_b: Small businesses wanting low-cost email marketing

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce tracking, revenue attribution, onsite campaigns
comparison_table.tool_b: Landing pages, A/B testing, real-time analytics, affordability

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store and need revenue attribution and product tracking
You want SMS marketing integrated with your email campaigns
You need onsite campaigns and visual automation builders tailored for online retailers
choose_b_if: You're a small business on a tight budget or want to start free
You need unlimited emails and landing pages included in your plan
You want strong A/B testing, analytics, and a platform rated highly for ease of use

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Drip excels for e-commerce businesses with specific revenue tracking and SMS requirements, while Moosend offers better value for small businesses and non-e-commerce use cases. Moosend has higher user ratings (4.7 vs 4.4 on G2), but Drip's specialized features justify its higher cost for online retailers.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at free for up to 1,000 subscribers with unlimited emails, then $9/month for paid plans. Drip has no free tier and starts at $39/month. For bootstrapped startups and small businesses, Moosend is the clear budget winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and migrations. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber list and campaign history. Contact support for both platforms to ensure a smooth transition and to verify any specific technical requirements for your migration.
